title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for real-world event prediction after years of regulatory battles and a lawsuit against government overseers. The company achieved a $22 billion valuation and scaled 100x in four weeks after breaking through regulatory barriers. The story frames prediction markets as infrastructure for "turning the future into a market" and establishing truth-finding mechanisms through knowledge markets.
